titleStmt.title: SII 30.187: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 187. (A.R. No. 263 of 1915.) Brahmadēsam, Cheyyar Taluk, North Arcot District Chandramauḷīśvara temple-on the north wall Rājādhirāja-Chōḷa I: Year 32: 1050 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription begins with the praśasti of the king ‘tiṅgaḷēr-peravaḷar’ etc. It records that the assembly Pārākramasōḻa-chatūrvēdimaṅgalam organised a meeting before the Ayōthi Āḻvar temple and agreed to sell 2000 kuḷi of land after receiving both the price-money and tax-money for providing food offerings to the god Tiruchchiṟṟambalamuḍaiyār (Lord Naṭarāja) of Pōndai-uḍaiyār temple. Śri Pōndai Arasu alias Tiruchchiṟṟambala Porkōil uḍaiyār, a madhyasthā and other members of assembly figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷer peṟavaḷar Aṅkatira
ḷavun tolkulam viḷaṅkat tonṟi malkiya va
ṭaticai kaṅkaiyun tenṟicai Ilaṅkaiyum kuṇaticaimakon=tayum
kuṭaticai kaṭāramum taṇṭāṟkoṇṭa tātaitan maṇṭala veṇkuṭai niḻa
ṟkiḻt tankuṭai niḻaṟṟa ticaitoṟuñ ceṅkolocci tenṉavan mānā
paraṇaṉ poṉmuṭi pacuntalai porukaḷattarintu vāraḷaviya kaḻal vīra
keraḷaṉai Āṉaikkiṭuvittu veṇāṭṭaracai ceṇāṭṭotukki pūvakattaracaic ceva
kantulaittu velaieḻu kān=taḷurcālai kalamaṟuppittu tikaḻ jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa
neṉ matikeḻu kovirājakecaripanmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirāja devarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 2
Āvatu jeyaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu tāmark koṭṭattu tāmar nāṭṭu parākkiramacoḻaca
ruppetimaṅkalattu mahāsabhaip peruṅkuṟi perumakkaḷom nammur tiruvayottiyā
ḻvār koyil munpe kūṭṭakuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyiruntu nammur śrīpontai Uṭaiyār Ātitāsataṇṭe
śvarar pakkal ponkoṇṭu Ittevar koyilil Eḻun=taruḷi niṟkum tiricciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār
kku tiruvamutu ceytaruḷa veṇṭuvataṟ(k)ku kuṭutta pūmiyāvatu nammur kīḻaikaḻaniyāl ve
ḷkuḷattūṭṭu nīrkovaikku meṟkum tenpārkellai meṟpaṭi Erinirko
vaikku vaṭakkum melpārkellai ṉṟi nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapārkellai cirā
maceri Ērikaraikku teṟkkum Innāṉkel
laiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam munpu kollaiyum kāṭukoḷum ka ra kola
mumāy kiṭan=ta nilam kuḻi Iraṇṭāyiramum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇam ceytu
kuṭuttom mahāsabhai peruṅkuṟi perumakka(ḷ)ḷom sabhaiyuḷḷi
ṟaiyūr civāmiruta kiramavittanum pariyalūr sarvakiratupaṭṭaṉu
ṟaiyūr pārāyaṇakiramavittaṉum paṇi(y) paṇikeṭṭu Eḻutinom Ivvūr mada
yastan śrīpontai Aracu Āna tiriciṟṟampala poṟkoyiṟ naṉeṉ
Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Ivvūr pāracivan cūṟṟi Oṟṟiyen Ippaṭi
ven vaiyānacan tiruvikkiramapaṭṭanen Ippaṭi yaṟiven
naṟcivaneṉ Ippaṭiyaṟiven Ūrppirāmaṇan pallapura muṭaiyānanantariyanāna vaḷavamā
ṇikka brahmarāyaneṉ Ippaṭiyaṟiven veḻkkovan cipontai kommanen Ippaṭiyaṟi
ven Ivvūr taccaṉ paḻamalaRead- paḻamalaikūttanneṉ Ippaṭiyaṟiven nalvaykānacaṉ kecuvapaṭṭaneṉ Ippaṭi
yaṟiven Ippaṭiyaṟiveṉ Ulakuṭaimātevi peruṉ t(ā)nattu tiruciṟṟampalape
rumakkaḷ vaicca tanmam ..
Digital edition of SII 30.187 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
